name: Peoplein Limited
analysis: PPE's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.7000. Trade idea: entry A$0.7000, stop A$0.6138, target A$0.8000 (1.16:1) — then trail it.
